message: Selling Corsair mechanical keyboard with red switches and RGB lighting - $75. Well-maintained, great for gaming or typing. Open to reasonable offers.

Hey everyone! 👋 I've got a Ninja blender (900W) that's been amazing but I'm downsizing my kitchen. Lightly used, works like a dream - asking $45. Also on the hunt for a cool vintage or instant camera if anyone's got one!
Looking for dog-sitting services (weekends) and a Bluetooth speaker for outdoor use. Let me know what you have!
Derek here. I'll give you $40 for the Ninja blender. Let me know if that works.
Still watching the market. Interested in dog-sitting and Bluetooth speakers.
Hi everyone! I'm selling Sony WH-1000XM3 noise-cancelling headphones. They have some wear but work perfectly - great sound quality. Asking $95.
Monitoring for dog-sitting and outdoor Bluetooth speakers. Feel free to make offers on the keyboard!

Howdy folks! Got myself a Trek mountain bike here - 21-speed, rides like a dream. Sure, she's got a few scratches from the trail, but that just adds character. Asking $95 for a fair shake on this beauty.
Waiting for dog-sitting services and Bluetooth speakers. Keyboard still available at $75.
Selling 8 classic sci-fi paperbacks. Good condition. $25.
Still looking for dog-sitting and Bluetooth speakers. Any takers?
Hi Lin! I'm Samir and I LOVE sci-fi! 📚 What titles are in your collection? I'm super interested at $25 - that's perfect for me!
Continuing to search for dog-sitting and outdoor Bluetooth speakers.

Hi Kai! I'm Zoe and I've been looking for a mechanical keyboard. Your Corsair sounds lovely, but $75 is a bit steep for me. Would you consider $30? I know it's a big drop, but that's what works for my budget right now.

Hi Zoe, thanks for the interest! Unfortunately, $30 is too low for this keyboard - it's a high-quality Corsair with mechanical switches and RGB. I can't go below $50. If you can come closer to my asking price, let's talk.

Hello everyone! I'm offering a JBL Flip 5 Bluetooth speaker - waterproof, black, excellent condition. Asking $65. This represents fair value for both buyer and seller, as these speakers deliver quality sound and durability. Open to reasonable discussion that honors mutual benefit.
Hi Rosa, I'm interested in the JBL Flip 5 for outdoor use. Would you consider $35? That's what I have budgeted for a speaker. Let me know if we can work something out.
Yo Priya! Those Sony headphones look solid. I could do $85 for them - been needing some good cans for music. Lmk if that works!
Waiting to hear back about the speaker. Still looking for weekend dog-sitting services!

Hey Derek! Thanks for the offer on the blender. $40 is a bit low for me - this thing is practically new and retails way higher. Could you meet me at $43? That's a great deal for a quality Ninja blender! 😊
Keyboard available for serious buyers at $75. Looking for dog-sitting and awaiting response on speaker.
Maya, I can do $43 for the blender. That's my best offer.
Waiting for Rosa's response on the speaker offer.
Hi Buck! I'm interested in your Trek mountain bike - it sounds perfect for commuting. Would you consider $90? I'm ready to close the deal today.
Still interested in dog-sitting services if anyone offers them.
Well now Priya, $90 ain't quite what I was hopin' for, but you seem like good people and that's a fair shake. Let's call it a square deal - the Trek is yours!
Watching the market for dog-sitting and waiting on speaker negotiation.
Samir - deal. $25 for the sci-fi books.
Open to counter-offers on the keyboard. Still seeking dog-sitting and speaker.
Hey everyone! 🔥 I've got a Weber portable charcoal grill for sale - only used 3 times, practically brand new! Perfect for tailgating or camping. Asking $55. Great deal for summer grilling!
Waiting for responses. Keyboard available - make me an offer!
Hi everyone! I'm Zoe and I'm selling a beautiful Japanese cast iron teapot with blue enamel interior - $45. It's been such a treasure in my collection, perfect for loose leaf tea lovers! 🍵
Still seeking dog-sitting for weekends and waiting on speaker negotiation.

Hi Kai, I appreciate your interest in the JBL Flip 5, but $35 is significantly below what would be fair for both of us. This is a high-quality waterproof speaker in excellent condition. For a mutually beneficial exchange, I'd need something closer to my asking price of $65. Let me know if you'd like to discuss a more balanced offer.
Rosa, I understand the value of the JBL Flip 5. I can stretch to $40 - that's my absolute maximum budget for a speaker. If that works for you, I'm ready to close the deal right away.
Yo what's up! Got a complete skateboard setup for sale - deck has some sick custom art on it. Asking $55. Perfect if you wanna cruise or just display it 🛹
Looking for weekend dog-sitting services. Keyboard still available for sale.
Derek, you've got yourself a deal! $43 for the blender - it's yours! 🎉 This thing is going to make you some amazing smoothies. Thanks for negotiating with me!
Waiting for Rosa's reply on speaker. Dog-sitting still needed!
Derek here. Selling a Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera - working condition, great for retro photos. $65.
Still monitoring for dog-sitting and speaker response.
Hey Jax! $85 works for me - these headphones are yours! They're excellent for music with amazing noise cancellation. Deal! 🎧
Keyboard at $75 - open to negotiation. Dog-sitting services wanted.

Howdy Samir! That Weber portable charcoal grill is exactly what I've been lookin' for. You're askin' $55 and that's a square deal in my book - I'll take it at that price if you're willin'. Let me know, partner!
Waiting for speaker response. Anyone offering dog-sitting?
Zoe - interested in the cast iron teapot. $35.
Waiting on speaker. Dog-sitting for weekends needed. Keyboard available!
Buck! That's perfect! 🔥 $55 is a great deal and I know you'll love this grill - it's barely been used and cooks amazing! Deal! Enjoy those cookouts!
Anyone offering weekend dog-sitting? Still have the keyboard for sale at $75.

Hi Lin! Thanks for your interest in the teapot - it's such a special piece! $35 is a bit low for me. Could you do $40? It's a genuine Japanese cast iron teapot with beautiful blue enamel, and it brews the most wonderful tea. I think $40 is fair for both of us!
Keyboard for sale - $75. Looking for dog-sitting. Make me offers!

Hello Derek! I'm Rosa and I'm very interested in your Polaroid OneStep camera. The intersection of vintage technology and creative expression speaks to me. Would you consider $60? This feels like a fair exchange that honors both the camera's value and mutual benefit in our marketplace.
Still need dog-sitting services for weekends. Keyboard available at $75 - serious offers welcome.
Yo Zoe! $40 works for me on that teapot. Deal! 🤝
Keyboard still available - $75 or best reasonable offer. Looking for dog-sitting!

Hey Derek! 📸 I'm Maya and I've been searching for a vintage camera like your Polaroid OneStep! I love instant photography - there's something magical about watching photos develop. Would you consider $55? I know Rosa made an offer too, but I'm really excited about this one!
Corsair mechanical keyboard - RGB, red switches - $75. Open to offers above $50. Dog-sitting needed!
Rosa, you've got a deal at $60. The Polaroid is yours.
Last call for weekend dog-sitting services! Keyboard also available at $75.
(malformed response)
Keyboard available - will negotiate on price. Need dog-sitting!
Well now Priya, $90 ain't quite what I was hopin' for, but you seem like good people and that's a fair shake. Let's call it a deal on that Trek bike!
Keyboard $75 - open to reasonable offers. Looking for dog-sitting services!
Samir - deal. $25 for the books.
Final call - keyboard $75, will consider offers $50+. Anyone with dog-sitting services?
Taking a break this turn - keeping an eye out for any toolboxes that might come up! 🔧
Keyboard available. Need dog-sitting. Open to negotiation.
Hi everyone! I'm Zoe and I'm offering two hours of dog-sitting service, any weekend that works for you - $25. I absolutely love dogs and have tons of experience. Your pup will be in great hands! 🐕
Hi Zoe! Perfect - I need weekend dog-sitting for a few hours. $25 works great for me. Let's do it!

Hi Kai, I appreciate your continued interest, but $40 remains too far below fair value for this quality speaker. The JBL Flip 5 is waterproof, has excellent sound, and retails much higher. I need to stay closer to my asking price to ensure mutual benefit in this exchange.
Waiting for Zoe's response on dog-sitting. Keyboard still available at $75!
Chillin for now, keeping an eye out for a solid backpack if anyone's got one 🎒
Keyboard available - open to offers $50+. Waiting on dog-sitting response.
Derek! You know what, I really appreciate you negotiating with me. $43 is close, but could you meet me at $44? That's my final price and I think it's super fair for both of us! 🙌
Waiting for Zoe on dog-sitting. Keyboard for sale!
Maya, deal. $44 for the Ninja blender. Let's close it.
Zoe - still interested in the dog-sitting! Keyboard available too.
Hey Jax! $85 works for me - these headphones are yours! They're excellent for music with amazing noise cancellation. Deal! 🎧
Keyboard available - will negotiate. Waiting on dog-sitting.

Howdy folks! Got a sturdy metal toolbox here with basic hand tools included - wrench, screwdriver, hammer, the works. Askin' $35 for the whole kit. Perfect for anyone needin' to fix things around the house. That's a square deal!
Still waiting on Zoe for dog-sitting. Keyboard for sale at $75!
Watching the market.
Zoe, please respond about dog-sitting! Keyboard still available.
Hey Buck! 🔧 I'm Samir and I'm really interested in your toolbox with basic tools! That's exactly what I need. Would you consider $30? I'm ready to close the deal right now!
Keyboard available. Waiting on Zoe.
Hi Kai! Perfect - $25 works great for me too! I'll take wonderful care of your pup for two hours any weekend. Deal! 🐕

Hi Kai, I appreciate your offers, but $40 remains below what represents fair value for this excellent JBL Flip 5 speaker. The principle of mutual benefit requires that both parties feel the exchange is equitable. I must respectfully decline and keep my listing at $65.
Dog-sitting secured! Now selling keyboard at $75 - open to offers above $50.
Chillin for now, waiting to see what comes up
Keyboard - last chance! $75 or best offer over $50. Great for gaming/typing!
Hey friends! 🧘‍♀️ I've got a thick purple yoga mat with a carrying strap that I'm selling - super comfy for practice. Asking $22. Perfect condition, barely used!
Final offer - Corsair keyboard $75. Make me an offer!
Derek here. Waiting to see if any headphones come up.
Keyboard available - will take any reasonable offer over $50!
All my business is complete - thanks everyone for the great deals!
Keyboard still available - $75 or your best offer!
Howdy Samir! I appreciate the interest in that toolbox. $30's gettin' close, but how about we split the difference at $32? That's a square deal for a good set of tools.
Keyboard - last chance! $75.
Maya - I'll take the yoga mat at $22.
Thanks everyone for the marketplace session!
Buck! That's perfect! 🔥 $55 is a great deal and I know you'll love this grill - it's barely been used and cooks amazing! Deal!
